overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female character with red hair and tribal gear exploring a moody, overcast coastal environment. The character walks along a rocky shoreline beside calm water with mountains in the background, then enters the water and begins swimming.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with tidal pools

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky terrain, navigating around shallow water pools and patches of red vegetation

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with gravel and small stones covering the surface
clear shallow pools of water reflecting the overcast sky
dense patches of reddish-brown tall grass or reeds growing along the shoreline
misty mountain range visible in the background under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a rugged coastal landscape under an overcast, dusky sky. The terrain consists of rocky ground interspersed with shallow tidal pools and patches of distinctive red vegetation. Mountains loom in the misty distance as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastline approaching deep water inlet

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the curve of the shoreline
approaching steep rocky cliff face on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the water's edge, navigating the rocky path while approaching a large white rock formation in the water

entered.detail: prominent white and gray rock outcropping rising from the water near the shore
tall layered rock wall forming the left boundary of the coastal path
green underwater vegetation visible in the clear coastal water

segments.scene_description: The character follows the curving shoreline, passing a distinctive large white rock formation jutting from the water. The path narrows between a steep rocky cliff on the left and the water on the right. Aquatic plants become visible in the clear green water as the character approaches the swimming entry point.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep water inlet with submerged vegetation

events.description: character enters the water and transitions from walking to swimming

agents.ego_description: swimming through the clear green water, moving away from the shore toward the open water

entered.detail: clear deep green water with visible underwater terrain and plants
small structures or ruins visible on the distant shoreline through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character enters the water and begins swimming through the clear green depths. The rocky shoreline falls behind as the character moves into open water, with distant village structures visible through the mist on the far shore. Aquatic plants sway beneath the surface as the swimming continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a rugged, overcast coastline before transitioning into a swim through clear coastal waters. It begins with the character walking across rocky ground and red vegetation under a dusky sky, with misty mountains looming in the distance. As the character follows the curving shoreline, the path narrows between a steep cliff and the water, passing a large white rock formation. The scene then shifts as the character enters the clear green depths, leaving the rocky terrain behind to swim over swaying aquatic plants. Finally, the camera moves further into the open water, revealing distant village structures through the mist on the far shore.
